rationale: Educ. Code §29.451 defines terms for state supported living centers; it has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 29.451. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter, "alleged offender resident," "interdisciplinary team," and "state supported living center" have the meanings assigned by Section 555.001, Health and Safety Code.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
